title: VeriSign: A Fairly Valued Monopoly
text: VeriSign has solid margins and strong free cash flow. Its core business segment is starting a series of price hikes that can substantially increase revenue.

title: Here's Why Verisign Stock Has Underperformed The S&P Since 2020
text: Verisign Inc. (NASDAQ: VRSN) stock price has lost 19% from around $216 at 2020 end to $174 currently, primarily due to unfavorable changes in its P/S multiple.
